strengths: ~20 years of continuous software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains — meets and slightly exceeds the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial track record as GISCollective founder and long freelance history demonstrates product ownership and initiative beyond pure execution
Current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq shows live builder fluency in agentic AI workflows
concerns: AI expertise is limited to roughly one year and is narrow in scope — no ML research background, no production AI systems at scale, and no recognized external AI thought leadership
Current seniority (Staff/Senior Software Engineer) is materially below the Director-level IC band this role targets, with no evidence of strategic advisory or principal-equivalent scope
No demonstrated experience advising strategic customers or partners, shaping cloud product strategy, or driving cross-organizational technical direction
response.justification: Bogdan has a broad, credible engineering career with genuine builder instincts and a track record of community teaching, but the role requires a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, cloud strategy fluency, and demonstrated ability to advise strategic partners at an executive level. His AI exposure is limited to roughly one year of agentic tooling work, his highest title is Staff Software Engineer, and there is no evidence of the strategic customer engagement, platform-scale AI product delivery, or organizational influence the position demands. The entrepreneurial background is a real positive signal but insufficient to bridge the seniority and domain-depth gaps.
